entry.title: IDC N0038320DW001 (P00025) awarded to LOCKHEED MARTIN CORPORATION, was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: H60 SEAHAWK PBL PROVIDES PBL SUPPLY SUPPORT FOR APPROXIMATELY 1,075 WEAPON REPLACEABLE ASSEMBLIES (WRAS) AND SHOP REPLACEABLE ASSEMBLIES (SRAS) ASSOCIATED WITH THE H-60 ROMEO AND SIERRA AIRCRAFT.

ns1:principalNAICSCode.description: OTHER AIRCRAFT PARTS AND AUXILIARY EQUIPMENT MANUFACTURING

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED
